faq.question: High CPU usage in checkout service
faq.solution: Check connection pool settings and database query performance. Scale horizontally if needed.

faq.question: Payment gateway timeout errors
faq.solution: Verify payment gateway upstream service health. Check circuit breaker configuration. Consider increasing timeout threshold.

faq.question: Database connection pool exhausted
faq.solution: Increase pool size in config. Check for connection leaks. Monitor slow queries.

faq.question: High p99 latency on API endpoints
faq.solution: Profile slow endpoints. Check external dependencies. Consider caching or optimization.

faq.question: Circuit breaker opens frequently
faq.solution: Lower failure threshold temporarily. Fix underlying service. Monitor error rates.

faq.question: Recent deployment caused issues
faq.solution: Review deployment changelog. Perform rollback if correlation found. Run smoke tests.
